designNotes.skillBaseline: Cold DoT (6s, 0.35 dotDamagePercent), 0.5 SPR cast component, 5s CD, creates Haunted (5s) for Spirit Barrage to consume. Chain-on-death: spirit jumps to next pack enemy with FRESH duration (vs Locust which transfers REMAINING duration).
designNotes.auditMandate: Replace ~50% of behavior slots (T1a/T1b/T2b/T3a/T3b/T3c/T4b = 7 per branch) with procs / rich conditionals / cross-skill effects. Per branch this design hits 3-4 procs/rich-conditionals out of 7 (>= 50%). Notables are all functionally unique within their branch.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Haunt as a DoT carrier — ticks proc additional debuffs and spread to pack. Cold becomes infectious. Cross-skill: feeds Locust Swarm + amplified by Plague of Toads. Sustained AoE pressure, slow ramp.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Haunt as gateway to the spirit world. Chains spawn minions, casts spawn spirits, AoE haunt covers the pack. Cross-skill: feeds minion-driven detonations via Mass Sacrifice + Soul Harvest auto-cast on death. Setup -> snowball.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Haunt as setup tool for Spirit Barrage / Soul Harvest burst. Crits feed soul_stacks, synergy with Hex, predator stacking on consecutive same-target casts. Spiky single-target feeder.

crossSkillTouchpoints: Plague T2: haunt tick spreads haunted to adjacent enemies (proc).
Plague T4: haunt tick has 5% chance to cast Locust Swarm at 50% damage (proc, ICD 5s).
Plague T5B: enemies hit by Plague of Toads get fresh-snapshot Haunt reapplied.
Spirit T7: Haunted enemy dying auto-casts Soul Harvest at 100% damage.
Voodoo T1b: haunt tick on Hexed target chance to gen soul_stack.
Voodoo T2: haunt crit spawns soul_stack.
Voodoo T3b: haunt crit instant-casts Hex on target (proc, ICD 6s).
Voodoo T6: haunt cast buffs next Spirit Barrage within 3s for +50% damage.

behaviorSlotAudit.plague_doctor: T1a=raw +dotMult, T1b=PROC frost-bite chilled, T2b=RICH compounding-tick, T3a=existing perDebuff, T3b=PROC crit-bleeding, T3c=raw +pen, T4b=raw +DoT support => 3 procs/rich of 7
behaviorSlotAudit.spirit_caller: T1a=raw +dmg, T1b=PROC cast-spawns-spirit, T2b=RICH whileMinionsAlive, T3a=PROC echoing-death buff, T3b=RICH perHauntedEnemyInPack, T3c=raw +duration, T4b=raw +minion dmg => 3 procs + 2 rich of 7
behaviorSlotAudit.voodoo_master: T1a=raw +crit, T1b=PROC tick-spawns-stack, T2b=RICH whileHexed, T3a=RICH perSoulStack (existing engine field), T3b=PROC crit-casts-hex, T3c=raw -CD, T4b=raw +heavy => 2 procs + 2 rich of 7

openQuestionsForReview: Q1: Best engine surface for proc-triggered skill cast? Options: (a) new SkillProcEffect.castSkill field with {skillId, damagePercent}, (b) rawBehaviors object handled in staff.ts. Mass Sacrifice doesn't have this pattern yet — Haunt T4 (Pestilence Carrier) and Voodoo T3b (Hex Catalyst) both need it. Recommend (a) as a first-class field; would also unblock similar designs across all weapons.

Q2: Best engine surface for proc that spawns combo state (vs buff)? Soulshatter (Voodoo T2) spawns soul_stack. Currently SkillProcEffect.applyBuff exists but soul_stack is a comboState. Options: (a) new createComboState proc effect field, (b) rawBehaviors handler in staff.ts that listens to onCrit and calls createComboState. Recommend (a) for clarity + reuse.

Q3: Best engine surface for proc that spawns minion? Spirit's Touch (Spirit T1b) spawns 3s spirit on Haunt cast. Reuse SUMMON_CONFIGS pattern or add summonMinion proc effect? Recommend a new SUMMON_CONFIG entry 'spirit_temp' (3s, 25% spell power, 1.5s interval) + summonMinion proc effect.

Q4: applyDebuff.target='adjacent' (Plague T2 Plague Spreader): need to add target selection to applyDebuff or handle entirely via rawBehaviors? Recommend rawBehaviors for now since target-selection logic is non-trivial; first-class support can come later.

Q5: Two of Plague's nodes lean on bleeding (T3b Festering Wounds proc). Bleed currently is a stack-based DoT — verify the auto-ailment surface accepts crit-triggered bleed application from a non-physical skill. Likely yes since bleeding is a debuff in DEBUFF_META; proc.applyDebuff bypasses the elemental routing.

Q6: T7 DREADBINDER (Voodoo) — does removing the DoT but doing all the damage upfront require a new code path, or can it reuse existing burst-on-cast logic? Probably needs rawBehaviors.hauntInstantBurst that staff.ts preRoll converts to direct damage and skips DoT application.

branches.theme: Haunt is a contagion. Ticks become a stacking, spreading vector for every other DoT in your kit.

nodes.name: Fresh Snapshot
nodes.description: First 2 ticks of Haunt deal +20/40% damage (rewards re-applying Haunt before it expires).
engineFields: hauntSnapshotBonus (NEW — numeric; tick.ts auto-ailment block multiplies first 2 ticks of Haunted by 1 + value/100, tracked via per-debuff tickCount)

nodes.name: Frost Bite
nodes.description: Haunt ticks have 20/40% chance to apply Chilled (1s).
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS); applyDebuff.chilled (EXISTS as DEBUFF_META entry)

nodes.name: Plague Spreader
nodes.description: Haunt ticks have 8% chance to apply Haunted to a random adjacent pack enemy at 50% snapshot for 6s.
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS)
rawBehaviors.spreadHauntAdjacent (NEW — read in staff.ts onAilmentTick proc handler; selects random non-haunted pack member, applies haunted with snapshot * percent/100, fresh duration)

nodes.name: Compounding Cold
nodes.description: Each consecutive Haunt tick on the same target adds +2/4% damage to subsequent ticks (caps at +50%, resets on chain or target switch).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.compoundingTick (NEW — read in tick.ts auto-ailment block: per-target counter on activeDebuff increments each tick, multiplies tick damage by 1 + min(maxPercent, counter * perTickPercent)/100, reset on chain-on-death and target switch)

nodes.name: Disease Carrier
nodes.description: +5/10% damage per debuff on target.
engineFields: conditionalMods.perAilmentStackOnTarget (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Festering Wounds
nodes.description: Haunt crits apply 1/2 stacks of Bleeding (3s).
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS); applyDebuff.bleeding (EXISTS in DEBUFF_META)

nodes.name: Spectral Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% cold and chaos penetration.
engineFields: coldPenetration (EXISTS); chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pestilence Carrier
nodes.description: Haunt ticks have 5% chance to cast Locust Swarm at 50% damage on the haunted target. Internal cooldown 5s.
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS)

SkillProcEffect.castSkill (NEW — { skillId: string; damagePercent?: number }. Recommend first-class field added to src/types/skills.ts SkillProcEffect; tick.ts proc loop handles it by enqueuing a synthetic skill cast at damagePercent scaling)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Soulrot
nodes.description: Haunt's DoT damage is doubled, but it no longer chains to a new target on death.
engineFields: dotMultiplier (EXISTS, additive +100)
rawBehaviors.disableChainOnDeath (NEW — read in combo.ts CARRIER_DEATH_BEHAVIOR for staff_haunt; if flag set, skip chain transfer)

nodes.name: Carrier Pact
nodes.description: When Plague of Toads hits a Haunted enemy, refresh Haunt to full duration with a fresh full-snapshot of caster's current stats. Cost: −15% Haunt damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.toadsRefreshHaunt (NEW — read in staff.ts postCast for staff_plague_of_toads; for each enemy hit that has Haunted, re-apply Haunted with current snapshot + full duration)
incDamage (EXISTS, negative)

nodes.name: Final Bloom
nodes.description: When Haunt expires naturally (not from chain), it explodes for 200% of remaining tick damage as cold AoE.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hauntFinalBloomPercent (NEW — read in tick.ts debuff-expiry block for staff_haunt; if non-zero AND expiry was natural (not chain), emit AoE damage event = snapshot * percent/100 to all pack members in radius)

nodes.name: ETERNAL HAUNTING
nodes.description: Haunt has unlimited duration on up to 3 enemies simultaneously. New casts replace the oldest Haunt. Cost: −30% Haunt tick damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.eternalHaunt (NEW — read in staff.ts postCast for staff_haunt; sets remainingDuration = +Infinity sentinel, tracks LRU set per skill, evicts oldest when count exceeds maxTargets)
dotMultiplier (EXISTS, negative)

branches.theme: Haunt is the bridge between worlds. Each cast and chain manifests a spirit; the dead fight beside you.

nodes.name: Soul Channel
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to Haunt.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Spirit's Touch
nodes.description: On Haunt cast: summon 1 temporary spirit minion that attacks for 3/5 seconds.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS)
SkillProcEffect.summonMinion (NEW — { type: string; duration: number; countOverride?: number }. Handler: tick.ts proc loop calls minions.summonMinions(state, type, count=1, duration override))
minions.SUMMON_CONFIGS['spirit_temp'] (NEW — count=1, hp=10% player max, attack=0.25 SPR, interval=1.5s, element='cold')

nodes.name: Phantasmal Echo
nodes.description: When Haunt chains to a new target on carrier death, also spawn a 3s spirit minion at the new target.
engineFields: hauntKillSpawnsMinion (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier — RUNTIME-PENDING per handoff; needs hook in tick.ts death loop where Haunt chain transfer happens)

nodes.name: Bound Power
nodes.description: +10/20% Haunt damage while any minion is alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS, added with mass_sacrifice.json)

nodes.name: Echoing Death
nodes.description: On Haunted enemy death: gain Spirit Resonance (+5/10% cast speed for 4s, stacks up to 5).
engineFields: procs[onKill] (EXISTS)

conditionParam.targetHadDebuff (NEW — checkConditionParam case: ProcContext.killedTargetDebuffIds includes the named debuff at moment of death; need to thread killedTargetDebuffIds into ProcContext from death loop)
BUFF_DEFS.spiritResonance (NEW — UI buff entry, castSpeedMult bonus)

nodes.name: Haunted Pack
nodes.description: +3/6% Haunt damage per Haunted enemy currently in the pack (caps at 5).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.damagePerHauntedEnemyInPack (NEW — read in staff.ts preRoll for staff_haunt; counts pack members with Haunted, multiplies damageMult by 1 + min(max, count) * perEnemy/100)

nodes.name: Persistent Spectre
nodes.description: +20/40% Haunt duration.
engineFields: ailmentDuration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Spectral Storm
nodes.description: Haunt now applies to ALL enemies in the pack on cast (snapshot uses caster's current stats).
engineFields: hauntIsAoe (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier — RUNTIME-PENDING per handoff; needs tick.ts onCast hook for staff_haunt to apply Haunted to every pack enemy with same snapshot when flag set)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (EXISTS, added with mass_sacrifice.json)

nodes.name: Chain Lord
nodes.description: Haunt's chain-on-death now compounds: each chain after the first deals +25% damage. Chain limit +2.
engineFields: hauntChainDamageCompound (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier — RUNTIME-PENDING per handoff; needs per-chain damage tracking in CARRIER_DEATH_BEHAVIOR transfer logic)
chainCount (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Spirit Conduit
nodes.description: Each living minion adds +20% Haunt tick damage. Cost: minions take 50% of Haunt's tick damage as self-damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.spiritConduit (NEW — read in tick.ts auto-ailment block for staff_haunt; multiplies tick damage by 1 + minionCount * damagePerMinionPercent/100; subtracts (tickDamage * minionSelfDamagePercent/100) from each living minion's HP)

nodes.name: Soul Tether
nodes.description: While Haunted enemies live, you heal 1% max HP per second per Haunted enemy (caps at 5%).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.soulTether (NEW — read in tick.ts maintenance block; once-per-second tick, heal player.hp += player.maxHp * min(maxStacks, hauntedEnemyCount) * healPercentPerSecond/100)

nodes.name: DEATH'S HARVEST
nodes.description: When a Haunted enemy dies, automatically cast Soul Harvest at 100% damage on a remaining target (no cooldown, no GCD). Cost: Haunt cooldown +3s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hauntDeathTriggersSoulHarvest (NEW — read in tick.ts death loop; if killed enemy had Haunted AND flag set AND remaining pack alive, enqueue auto-cast of staff_soul_harvest at 100% damage targeting random alive pack member)
cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

branches.theme: Haunt is the perfect setup. Crit it, stack it, then unleash through Spirit Barrage and Soul Harvest.

nodes.name: Phantom Edge
nodes.description: +10/20% critical strike chance on Haunt.
engineFields: incCritChance (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Cursed Tick
nodes.description: Haunt ticks on Hexed targets have 15/30% chance to generate 1 soul_stack.
engineFields: procs[onAilmentTick] (EXISTS)
conditionParam.targetHasDebuff (NEW — checkConditionParam case: ProcContext.targetDebuffIds.includes(value); thread from auto-ailment caller)
SkillProcEffect.createComboState (NEW — { stateId: ComboStateId; stacks?: number; durationOverride?: number }. Handler: tick.ts proc loop calls combo.ts createComboState with provided stateId/stacks)

nodes.name: Soulshatter
nodes.description: Haunt critical strikes generate 1 soul_stack (max 5). Internal cooldown 1s.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS)
createComboState (NEW — same field as Cursed Tick)

nodes.name: Hex Bond
nodes.description: +20/40% Haunt damage when target is Hexed.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS); requires debuffId='hexed' to evaluate against target's debuffs

nodes.name: Stack Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% Haunt damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: damagePerSoulStackActive (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier; needs verification it's wired in staff.ts preRoll → damageMult)

nodes.name: Hex Catalyst
nodes.description: Haunt critical strikes have 25/50% chance to instantly cast Hex on the target. Internal cooldown 6s.
engineFields: procs[onCrit] (EXISTS)
castSkill (NEW — same field as Pestilence Carrier)

nodes.name: Spectral Velocity
nodes.description: −10/20% Haunt cooldown.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Predator's Mark
nodes.description: Each consecutive Haunt cast on the same target grants +5% crit chance for 8s (stacks up to 5, resets on target switch).
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS)
conditionParam.sameTarget (EXISTS — Blade Sense uses it)
conditionParam.resetOnTargetSwitch (NEW — clears existing buff stacks when target changes; thread via ProcContext.lastTargetId)
BUFF_DEFS.predatorsMark (NEW — UI buff entry)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Final Whisper
nodes.description: Haunted enemies below 25% HP take +100% damage from all of your skills.
engineFields: hauntedExecuteThreshold (EXISTS in ResolvedSkillModifier — RUNTIME-PENDING per handoff; needs target-HP gate in death loop / tick.ts damage application: if target.hasDebuff('haunted') && hpPct < threshold, multiply incoming damage * 2)

nodes.name: Soul Trap
nodes.description: When a Haunted enemy dies, generate 1 soul_stack. Cost: Haunt cooldown +1s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hauntedDeathSpawnsSoulStack (NEW — read in tick.ts death loop; if killed enemy had Haunted AND flag set, call combo.ts createComboState('soul_stack', 1))
cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Ghostly Finale
nodes.description: After casting Haunt, your next Spirit Barrage cast within 3 seconds deals +50% damage.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS)
BUFF_DEFS.ghostlyFinale (NEW — UI buff entry)

Buff consumption: needs staff.ts preRoll on staff_spirit_barrage to consume ghostlyFinale buff for +50% damageMult and clear it; alternative is generic 'consume on next cast of skill X' field in BuffEffect

nodes.name: DREADBINDER
nodes.description: Haunt no longer deals damage over time. Instead, it deals all 6s of damage instantly as cold burst and applies Hexed (5s). Cost: Haunt cooldown +3s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.hauntInstantBurst (NEW — read in staff.ts preRoll for staff_haunt; if true, multiply cast damage by (dotDuration/STANDARD_DOT_RATE * dotDamagePercent), skip Haunted DoT debuff application, still create haunted comboState for Spirit Barrage consumption)
rawBehaviors.hauntApplyHexedOnCast (NEW — read in staff.ts postCast for staff_haunt; create hexed comboState + hexed debuff on target)
cooldownIncrease (EXISTS)

firstClassProcEffects: SkillProcEffect.castSkill: { skillId: string; damagePercent?: number }  — for Pestilence Carrier (Plague T4), Hex Catalyst (Voodoo T3b)
SkillProcEffect.summonMinion: { type: string; duration: number; countOverride?: number } — for Spirit's Touch (Spirit T1b)
SkillProcEffect.createComboState: { stateId: ComboStateId; stacks?: number; durationOverride?: number } — for Cursed Tick (Voodoo T1b), Soulshatter (Voodoo T2)
newConditionParams: targetHasDebuff: string  — current debuffs on target at trigger time
targetHadDebuff: string  — debuffs target had at moment of death (for onKill)
resetOnTargetSwitch: boolean — clears existing buff stacks when target changes
newSummonConfig: minions.SUMMON_CONFIGS['spirit_temp'] — { count:1, hpPercent:10, damagePercent:25 of SPR, attackInterval:1.5, element:'cold', durationDefault:3 }
newBuffDefs: ghostlyFinale — damageMult 1.5 consumed on next Spirit Barrage cast (Voodoo T6)
newRawBehaviorsObjects: hauntFinalBloomPercent — numeric, AoE on natural expire (Plague T6)
alreadyInEngineRuntimePending: hauntIsAoe (Spirit T4) — needs tick.ts onCast hook for staff_haunt to apply Haunted to all pack
hauntKillSpawnsMinion (Spirit T2) — needs hook in chain-on-death transfer
hauntChainDamageCompound (Spirit T5A) — needs per-chain damage tracking
hauntedExecuteThreshold (Voodoo T5A) — needs target-HP gate in damage application
alreadyExisting: dotMultiplier, ailmentDuration, coldPenetration, chaosPenetration, incDamage, incCritChance, incCritMultiplier, cooldownReduction, cooldownIncrease, chainCount, minionDamageMult, damagePerSoulStackActive, conditionalMods (whileMinionsAlive, perAilmentStackOnTarget, whileDebuffActive)

preTranspileChecklist: [ ] User reviews this JSON, signs off on each branch's design
[ ] Decide Q1: castSkill as first-class proc field vs rawBehaviors
[ ] Decide Q2: createComboState as first-class proc field vs rawBehaviors
[ ] Decide Q3: summonMinion as first-class proc field + spirit_temp SUMMON_CONFIG
[ ] Decide Q4: applyDebuff target selection (rawBehaviors path is fine for V1)
[ ] Once Q1-Q6 resolved: add fields to src/engine/skillGraph.ts (interface + EMPTY_GRAPH_MOD)
[ ] Add new conditionParam cases to checkConditionParam in src/engine/combatHelpers.ts
[ ] Add BUFF_DEFS for spiritResonance, predatorsMark, ghostlyFinale
[ ] Wire each rawBehaviors handler in src/engine/combat/weapons/staff.ts at the noted hook (preRoll/postCast/tickMaintenance/onAilmentTick handler, etc.)
[ ] Wire runtime-pending fields (hauntIsAoe, hauntKillSpawnsMinion, hauntChainDamageCompound, hauntedExecuteThreshold) in tick.ts
[ ] Register in src/data/skillGraphs/talentTrees.ts (already registered — just verify)
[ ] Extend sim/qa-staff-mechanics.ts with one assertion per proc/notable
[ ] Pre-push gate: npx tsc -b && npx vite build && npx tsx sim/qa-staff-mechanics.ts && npx tsx sim/qa-talents.ts --skill staff_haunt
